creator: lysfjord.daniel@smokepit.net
text:
Created attachment 230321
poudriere build log for www/gitlab-ce

www/gitlab-ce- 14.5.2_1 depends on rubygem-sidekiq62 and rubygem-sidekiq-cron, but rubygem-sidekiq-cron depends on rubygem-sidekiq, making it unbuildable.

===>   gitlab-ce-14.5.2_1 depends on package: rubygem-sidekiq-cron>=1.0<2.0 - not found
===>   Installing existing package /packages/All/rubygem-sidekiq-cron-1.2.0_1.pkg
[default-default-job-01] Installing rubygem-sidekiq-cron-1.2.0_1...
[default-default-job-01] `-- Installing rubygem-fugit-1.5.2...
[default-default-job-01] |   `-- Installing rubygem-et-orbi-1.2.6...
[default-default-job-01] |   `-- Extracting rubygem-et-orbi-1.2.6: .......... done
[default-default-job-01] |   `-- Installing rubygem-raabro-1.4.0...
[default-default-job-01] |   `-- Extracting rubygem-raabro-1.4.0: ........ done
[default-default-job-01] `-- Extracting rubygem-fugit-1.5.2: .......... done
[default-default-job-01] `-- Installing rubygem-sidekiq-6.3.1...
pkg-static: rubygem-sidekiq-6.3.1 conflicts with rubygem-sidekiq62-6.2.2 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/bin/sidekiq

Failed to install the following 1 package(s): /packages/All/rubygem-sidekiq-cron-1.2.0_1.pkg
*** Error code 1
